section_miscategorizations.text: He denies fibular venous distention and reports lungs have some fine crackles bilaterally with trace lower extremity edema.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Denial of jugular venous distention and presence of crackles and edema are framed as exam-style objective findings, not typical patient-reported symptoms; placing them in S could mislead a reader about whether these were clinician findings.
